changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE EXERCISES DROP CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISE_TYPE; ALTER TABLE EXERCISES ADD CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISE_TYPE CHECK (TYPE IN ('MULTIPLE_CHOICE','FILL_BLANK','WORD_ORDER', 'TRANSLATION','TRUE_FALSE','SENTENCE_BUILDING','LISTENING'))
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE EXERCISES DROP CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISE_TYPE; ALTER TABLE EXERCISES ADD CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISE_TYPE CHECK (TYPE IN ('MULTIPLE_CHOICE','FILL_BLANK','WORD_ORDER', 'TRANSLATION','TRUE_FALSE','SENTENCE_BUILDING'))
